messages.author: swarm
messages.text:
BL-493 — Route a ticket's swarm events into its epic's topic (or the standing Backlog topic) as an edit-in-place status message; stop minting per-ticket topics and drop the icon-only approval path
What it solves: THE WIRING SLICE of the BL-491 epic (engineering.prompt runtime-wiring rule: this is where the pure
target-resolver and status-text builder are CALLED on a real event and their per-ticket message-id
state is persisted, so the epic actually fires live). depends_on BL-492 (needs the standing Backlog
…
First acceptance signal: An epic-bound ticket event posts a status message into its epic's topic, prefixed with the ticket id
Approval context: Core wiring slice of the BL-491 epic. Implements your three decisions: D1 edit-in-place status message per ticket (one message, status prefix edited each transition — reuses editInPlaceMessageSync), D3 awaiting-approval via the Approvals topic only (the icon-only per-ticket-topic path is deleted). …
BL-493 needs your approval before it can proceed. Reply here with "approve BL-493" (or "reject BL-493 <reason>") to act.
